hero.description: Curiosity in motion. Constantly testing, asking, breaking, and rebuilding my understanding of the world.

aboutMe.title: about-me
paragraphs: Nice to meet you! I'm Sam, curious by nature.
Equal parts thinker and maker. Passionate about simple, right-in-front-of-your-nose ideas, "why didn’t I think of that".
Truthfully, I hate most ads. I’m only interested in making things worth sharing with my wife, who’s the real cynic.
Obsessed with great design, especially the kind you don’t notice until it’s missing.

whereIWork.availabilityLine: Available for selective collaborations with brands, studios, and teams who care about the work.

collaboration.title: Let’s work together on your next project
